title: 2025-12-02 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 8.49
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-12-02: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 8.49/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-12-02, the score printed 8.49/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
